prompt: Download just this one video: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1test456

assertions.name: simpler_than_bulk
assertions.description: Single video command should not include playlist/archive options

assertions.name: includes_quality
assertions.check: Output contains -f flag with format specification

assertions.name: correct_url
assertions.description: Should use the provided video URL
assertions.check: Output contains BV1test456 or the provided URL

assertions.name: provides_command
assertions.description: Should provide a concrete yt-dlp command
